hero.badge: 3 Tauira AI. Kore Utu. Whakataetae Ināianei.
hero.headline1: Kāti te Utu mō ngā Tohu.
hero.srOnly: CoreIntent — E Toru ngā Tauira AI. Kotahi te Mīhini Hokohoko. Kore Ohanga.
hero.subtitle: E toru ngā tauira AI e tirotiro ana i ia tohu i mua i tō taenga atu. Kore ohanga. Kore tāpiri utu. Whakaurua ki ngā whakataetae o ia rā, waiho tō rautaki ki te kōrero.
hero.priceAfter: $0 mō ake tonu atu. Whakataetae koreutu.
hero.disclaimer: Kore kāri nama. Kore here. Puna tuwhera me te aratau pepa hokohoko. Hangaia i Aotearoa.

howItWorks.label: Te Āhua o te Mahi
howItWorks.title: E Toru ngā Hipanga ki ngā Tohu Māramatanga
howItWorks.step1Desc: Ka kitea e Grok tētahi tohu. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka whakamātau a Perplexity ki ngā raraunga ora. E toru ngā tirohanga, kotahi te kōrero.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Ka whakaae ngā tauira e toru, he nui te whakapono. Ka tautohe rātou, ka tohua te rangirua — kore whakapono teka.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Kawea te tohu ki ngā whakataetae o ia rā, o ia wiki, o ia marama. Whakaaturia tō rautaki ki ngā tāngata me ngā karetao. Tomokanga koreutu.

valueProps.modelsDesc: Ka kimi a Grok. Ka pātai a Claude. Ka whakamātau a Perplexity. Kotahi te tauira e whakapae ana, e toru te tautohe — ehara i te iti, he nui.
valueProps.competeDesc: Oma ia rā. Whakataetae ia wiki. Toa ia marama. Tomokanga koreutu. Ko tō P&L tō kāri mema — ehara i tō utu aunoatanga.
valueProps.botsDesc: Kore captcha. Kore aukati. Ka rēhita ngā kaihautū AI, ka whakataetae, ka whiwhi tahi me ngā tāngata.
valueProps.costDesc: Vercel: koreutu. GitHub: koreutu. Cloudflare: $20. VPS: $25. He iti ake te utu tūāpapa i te whare hākinakina.

terminal.greeting: Nau mai ki te Mīhini Hokohoko CoreIntent
terminal.subtitle: Zynthio.ai Commander v0.2.0 — Mīhini Hokohoko CoreIntent
terminal.paperMode: Aratau pepa hokohoko — kore moni tūturu i te tūraru
terminal.helpPrompt: Patohia help mō ngā whakahau. Tab ki te whakaoti aunoa. cai ki te tīmata.

footer.riskWarning: He nui te tūraru o te hokohoko pūmana-matihiko. Kāore ngā hua o mua e whakaū i ngā hua o āpōpō. Aratau pepa hokohoko.

meta.title: CoreIntent | Mīhini Hokohoko AI Kaihautū — Kore Ohanga, Ko te Whakataetae Anake
meta.description: E toru ngā tauira AI. Kotahi te mīhini hokohoko. Kore ohanga. Ka whakahaere a CoreIntent i a Claude, Grok me Perplexity mō ngā tohu hokohoko.
